meta.title: Terms of Service | Blen
meta.description: Clear, transparent terms for using Blen's AI relationship compatibility platform.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: Clear, transparent terms for using Blen's AI relationship compatibility platform

introduction.title: Introduction
paragraphs: Welcome to Blen. These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of our AI-powered relationship compatibility platform. By creating an account or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

Blen provides AI-driven insights to help you better understand yourself and your relationship compatibility. Our platform is designed to support your personal growth and relationship decisions, not replace professional counseling or therapy.

user-responsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
user-responsibilities.intro: When using Blen, you agree to:
bullets: Provide accurate and truthful information when creating your profile
Maintain the confidentiality of your account credentials
Use the platform responsibly and respectfully
Respect the privacy and boundaries of other users
Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
paragraphs: You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account. If you believe your account has been compromised, please contact us immediately.

acceptable-use.title: Acceptable Use Policy

callout.title: Important Notice
callout.description: The following activities are strictly prohibited on our platform

acceptable-use.leadIn: You may not use Blen to:
bullets: Harass, abuse, or harm other users
Share false, misleading, or deceptive information
Attempt to access unauthorized areas of the platform
Reverse engineer or exploit our AI systems
Collect or store personal data from other users
Use the service for commercial purposes without authorization
Violate any intellectual property rights

account-subscription.title: Account and Subscription Terms
paragraphs: Blen offers both free and premium subscription tiers. Premium features include advanced AI insights, unlimited compatibility analyses, and priority support.
bullets: Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled
You can cancel anytime from your account settings
Refunds are provided on a case-by-case basis
Price changes will be communicated 30 days in advance

ai-insights.title: AI Insights Disclaimer

callout.title: Critical Disclaimer
callout.description: AI insights are for informational purposes only and should not be considered professional advice

paragraphs: Our AI-powered compatibility insights are based on algorithms, data analysis, and machine learning models. While we strive for accuracy, these insights:
bullets: Should be used as guidance, not definitive answers
May not account for the full complexity of human relationships
Are continuously improved but may contain limitations
Always use your own judgment and seek professional help when dealing with serious relationship issues.

privacy-data.title: Privacy and Data Usage
paragraphs: Your privacy is fundamental to how we operate. We collect and process data only to provide and improve our services.
privacy-data.privacyPolicyPrefix: For detailed information about data collection, processing, and your rights, please review our

limitation-liability.title: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: Blen is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law:
bullets: We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
Our liability is limited to the amount you paid for the service
We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service
We are not responsible for decisions made based on AI insights

termination.title: Termination Policy
paragraphs: Either party may terminate this agreement at any time:
bullets: You may delete your account at any time from account settings
We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms
Upon termination, your access to the platform will cease
Some data may be retained as required by law or for legitimate business purposes

contact.title: Contact & Legal Support
contact.intro: If you have questions about these Terms of Service or need legal support:

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Blen
meta.description: Your privacy is at the heart of everything we do. Learn how we protect, process, and respect your data.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy is at the heart of everything we do. Learn how we protect, process, and respect your data.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: At Blen, we believe privacy is a fundamental human right. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, protect, and share your information when you use our AI-powered relationship compatibility platform.
We're committed to being transparent about our data practices and giving you control over your personal information.

data-collection.title: Data Collection
paragraphs: We collect information to provide you with personalized AI insights and improve our services.

ai-processing.title: AI Data Processing

callout.title: How Our AI Works
callout.description: Your data is processed by our AI to generate personalized compatibility insights

paragraphs: Our AI systems analyze your responses, preferences, and behavior patterns to provide relationship insights. Here's how we protect your data during AI processing:
bullets: Data is anonymized during analysis when possible
AI models are trained on aggregated, de-identified data
Personal identifiers are separated from analytical data
You can opt out of having your data used for model improvement

privacyControlCards.title: Profile Visibility
privacyControlCards.description: Control who can see your profile and compatibility insights

privacyControlCards.title: Marketing Preferences
privacyControlCards.description: Opt in or out of promotional communications

privacyControlCards.title: Data Access
privacyControlCards.description: Request a copy of all your data at any time

privacyControlCards.title: AI Training Opt-Out
privacyControlCards.description: Choose whether your data improves our AI models

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.heading: Cookies Policy
paragraphs: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience and understand how you use our platform.

essential.label: Essential Cookies:
essential.description: Required for the platform to function (authentication, security)

analytics.label: Analytics Cookies:
analytics.description: Help us understand usage patterns (you can opt out)

security.title: Security Practices
paragraphs: We implement industry-leading security measures to protect your data:

securityItems.title: Encryption
securityItems.description: All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256)

securityItems.title: Access Controls
securityItems.description: Strict access policies and authentication requirements for our team

securityItems.title: Regular Audits
securityItems.description: Independent security audits and penetration testing quarterly

third-party.title: Third-Party Services
third-party.heading: Third-Party Services
paragraphs: We work with trusted third-party services to operate our platform:
bullets: Cloud hosting providers (data encrypted at rest)
Payment processors (we never store credit card numbers)
Analytics services (anonymized data only)
Email service providers (for account notifications)

data-retention.title: Data Retention
data-retention.heading: Data Retention
data-retention.intro: We retain your data only as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations:
bullets: Active account data: retained while your account is active
Deleted account data: removed within 90 days
Legal requirements: some data retained for compliance (anonymized when possible)
Analytics data: aggregated and anonymized after 24 months

your-rights.title: Your Rights
your-rights.heading: Your Rights

callout.title: You're in Control
callout.description: You have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data at any time

your-rights.intro: Under GDPR and other privacy laws, you have the following rights:

rights.label: Right to Access:
rights.text: Request a copy of your data

rights.label: Right to Portability:
rights.text: Export your data in a standard format

rights.label: Right to Object:
rights.text: Opt out of certain data processing

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have questions about privacy or want to exercise your rights?

hero.title: How can we help you?
hero.subtitle: We're here to support your journey. Reach out directly for help.

categories.title: Getting Started
categories.description: New to Blen? Learn the basics

emailSupport.title: Email Support
emailSupport.description: Get detailed help from our support team. We typically respond within 24 hours.

liveChat.title: Live Chat
liveChat.description: Chat with our team in real-time for quick answers.

items.question: What is Blen and how does it work?
items.answer: Blen is an AI-powered relationship compatibility platform that helps you understand yourself and find meaningful connections. Our advanced AI analyzes your personality, values, and preferences to provide personalized compatibility insights and recommendations.

items.question: How accurate are the AI compatibility insights?
items.answer: Our AI models are trained on extensive relationship psychology research and real-world data. While our insights are highly accurate, they should be used as guidance rather than absolute predictions. Human relationships are complex, and we encourage you to combine AI insights with your own judgment.

items.question: Is my personal information safe and private?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use industry-leading encryption, strict access controls, and follow GDPR compliance standards. Your data is never sold to third parties, and you have full control over your privacy settings. See our Privacy Policy for complete details.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime from your account settings. There are no cancellation fees, and you'll continue to have access to premium features until the end of your billing period.

items.question: What's the difference between free and premium?
items.answer: Free accounts include basic compatibility assessments and limited insights. Premium unlocks unlimited compatibility analyses, advanced AI insights, priority support, and exclusive features like relationship growth tracking.

items.question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
items.answer: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, enter your email, and we'll send you a secure reset link. If you don't receive it within a few minutes, check your spam folder or contact support.

items.question: How do I delete my account?
items.answer: Go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. This will permanently remove your data within 90 days. If you have an active subscription, make sure to cancel it first to avoid future charges.

items.question: Why am I not seeing quality compatibility matches?
items.answer: Match quality improves as you complete more assessments and provide detailed profile information. Make sure your profile is complete and your preferences are accurately set. Our AI learns from your interactions to provide better recommendations over time.

helpTopics.title: Account Recovery
helpTopics.description: Having trouble accessing your account? We can help you recover it.

helpTopics.title: Billing & Payments
helpTopics.description: Questions about subscriptions, refunds, or payment methods?

helpTopics.title: Safety & Reporting
helpTopics.description: Report concerning behavior or safety issues immediately.
